10.reason: [Incorrect range checks: 'a'<=s[i-1]&&'z'>=s[i+1] mixes left and right bounds; should check both ends are in same category (e.g., both lowercase, both uppercase, or both digits). Also missing digit case. Additionally, accesses s[i-1] when i=0 and s[i+1] when i=p-1, causing out-of-bounds reads.]

Also missing digit case. Additionally, accesses s[i-1] when i=0 and s[i+1] when i=p-1, causing out-of-bounds reads.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect range checks: 'a'<=s[i-1]&&'z'>=s[i+1] mixes left and right bounds; should check both ends are in same category (e.g., both lowercase), but this condition allows s[i-1]='a' and s[i+1]='Z', which violates same-type requirement. Also missing digit case. Additionally, accesses s[i-1] when i=0 and s[i+1] when i=p-1 causing out-of-bounds reads.]
